title: [Lake of Fear, Southern Expanse]
description: The smooth, uniform surface of the lake stretches out in all directions, making navigation difficult.  Nearby, a half-eaten fish stares blankly up through the ice, its crystalized entrails adding a bit of macabre color to an otherwise bleak environment.

wayto.27022: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'south'
wayto.27024: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'north'
